## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type

- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Security
- [ ] Build/configuration
- [ ] Refactor

## Verification

- [ ] `flutter analyze`
- [ ] `flutter test`
- [ ] Android APK build
- [ ] Manual app test
- [ ] Not applicable

## RouterOS / Android Notes

Mention any affected RouterOS commands, Android permissions, VPN behavior,
database migrations, or platform-channel changes.

## Security Checklist

- [ ] No real router credentials committed
- [ ] No WireGuard private keys committed
- [ ] No customer or sales data committed
- [ ] No release signing keys committed
